summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stock Dashboard Power BI layout redesign. All 18 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend fully verified: Dark filter bar with slicers at top, Left panel (Modelo x Talla), Center 2x3 grid (GRAU 238/GRAU 55, GAMARRA 209, GM218, BOOSH, GAMARRA 207, TOTAL), Right panel (ALMACEN). All 7 panels visible simultaneously. TOTAL panel correctly sums all stores (44,229 = 31223+3182+2856+2644+2422+1902). Canonical tienda mapping verified (TALLER→ALMACEN, GM209→GAMARRA 209). PROBADOR excluded. Amber totals styling present.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/filters returns tienda_canonicas with correct names (ALMACEN, BOOSH, GAMARRA 207, GAMARRA 209, GM218, GRAU 238 / GRAU 55)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/filters returns all filter types (marcas, tipos, entalles, telas, tallas, colores)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/panels returns all 7 panels (6 real + TOTAL)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/panels TOTAL grandTotal (44229) equals sum of all real stores
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/panels returns KPIs (total_stock: 44229, modelos: 879, variantes: 6108, tiendas: 6)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/panels returns tallas array
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/panels store structure has Color x Talla matrix with colores, matrix, totals
Backend: ALMACEN maps from TALLER (31223 stock)
Backend: GAMARRA 209 maps from GM209 (3182 stock)
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/panels with es_negro=si filter reduces stock to 16832
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/modelo-talla returns pivot data with tallas, rows, totals_by_talla, grand_total
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/modelo-talla rows have modelo, cells, total structure
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/modelo-talla with marca=BOOSH filter works (15 modelos, 1567 total)
Backend: PROBADOR model excluded from modelo-talla results
Backend: Total stock is 44229 as expected
Backend: Modelos count is 879 as expected
Backend: Six canonical tiendas present
Backend: Store totals match expected values (ALMACEN:31223, GAMARRA 209:3182, GRAU 238/GRAU 55:2856, GM218:2644, GAMARRA 207:2422, BOOSH:1902)
Frontend: Stock Dashboard page loads at /stock-dashboard
Frontend: Dark filter bar at top with timestamp (ACTUALIZADO)
Frontend: Slicers visible - Tienda, Marca, Tipo, Entalle, Tela, Talla, Color
Frontend: Modelo search input visible
Frontend: Toggle filters - Es LQ, Por Arreglar, Es Negro
Frontend: KPIs displayed - Stock: 44,229 | Modelos: 879 | Variantes: 6108
Frontend: Left panel shows Modelo x Talla (879 modelos)
Frontend: Center 2x3 grid shows 6 store panels (GRAU 238/GRAU 55, GAMARRA 209, GM218, BOOSH, GAMARRA 207, TOTAL)
Frontend: Right panel shows ALMACEN
Frontend: All 7 panels visible simultaneously (no dropdown for tienda selection)
Frontend: TOTAL panel has amber/gold header styling
Frontend: Amber total rows in each panel (bg-amber classes)
Frontend: Collapsible sidebar works
Frontend: PROBADOR not in modelo list
Frontend: Detalle de Stock section expandable
Frontend: Es Negro filter works - changes stock from 44,229 to 16,832
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Dashboard Power BI layout fully functional and tested. Backend endpoints: /api/stock-dashboard/filters, /api/stock-dashboard/panels, /api/stock-dashboard/modelo-talla all working correctly. Frontend shows all 7 panels simultaneously in Power BI layout (left: Modelo x Talla, center: 2x3 grid of stores + TOTAL, right: ALMACEN). KPI reference values: 44229 total stock, 879 modelos, 6108 variantes, 6 canonical tiendas. Store totals: ALMACEN=31223, GAMARRA 209=3182, GRAU 238/GRAU 55=2856, GM218=2644, GAMARRA 207=2422, BOOSH=1902. TOTAL=sum of all stores. Previous iteration 6 bug (ambiguous column reference in pivot-modelo-tienda) appears to be related to old endpoints that are no longer in use.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. The redesigned Stock Dashboard endpoints and frontend are working as expected.
